minerType.name: XMR-RandomX
minerType.description: RandomX Miner for 36 Android Chipsets - By Cellhasher
minerType.installScript:
import os, time, subprocess, tempfile
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed

ADB = os.environ.get("adb_path", "adb")
devices = os.environ.get("devices", "").split()

install_script_content = r'''#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
set -e

echo "[*] Configuring Termux for external app access..."
mkdir -p ~/.termux
if ! grep -q "allow-external-apps" ~/.termux/termux.properties 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "allow-external-apps = true" >> ~/.termux/termux.properties
    echo "[OK] allow-external-apps enabled"
else
    echo "[OK] allow-external-apps already configured"
fi

echo "[*] Updating Termux packages..."
yes '' | pkg upgrade -y || true
pkg update -y || true

echo "[*] Installing dependencies..."
pkg install git -y || true

echo "[*] Cloning CellMiner repository..."
if [ -d "$HOME/xmr-cellminer" ]; then
    echo "[*] Repository exists, pulling latest changes..."
    cd "$HOME/xmr-cellminer" && git pull || true
else
    git clone https://github.com/CellHasher/XMR-Cellminer "$HOME/xmr-cellminer"
fi

echo "[*] Running auto-detect installer..."
cd "$HOME/xmr-cellminer"
bash install.sh

echo "[*] Verifying installation..."
if [ -f "$HOME/cellminer/cellminer" ]; then
    echo "[OK] CellMiner binary installed"
    ls -la "$HOME/cellminer/cellminer"
else
    echo "[!] CellMiner binary not found after install!"
fi

echo "[OK] CellMiner installation complete!"
'''

def install_on_device(device_id, script_path):
    try:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Starting installation...")

        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am force-stop com.termux", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)

        device_temp_path = "/data/local/tmp/cellminer_install.sh"
        print(f"[{device_id}] Pushing install script...")
        subprocess.run(f'{ADB} -s {device_id} push "{script_path}" "{device_temp_path}"', shell=True, check=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] chmod +x ...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell chmod 755 {device_temp_path}", shell=True, check=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Launching Termux and waiting for initialization...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am start -n com.termux/com.termux.app.TermuxActivity", shell=True)
        time.sleep(10)

        adb_typed_cmd = "bash%s/data/local/tmp/cellminer_install.sh"
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"{adb_typed_cmd}\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Install process started successfully!")
        return f"[{device_id}] Success"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}")
        return f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}"

with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode='w', encoding='utf-8', newline='\n', delete=False, suffix='.sh') as f:
    f.write(install_script_content)
    local_script_path = f.name

if not devices:
    print("No devices in $devices")
else:
    print(f"Saved installation script to {local_script_path}")
    print("=== Starting CellMiner Installation (Parallel) ===")

    max_workers = max(1, len(devices))
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=max_workers) as executor:
        future_to_device = {executor.submit(install_on_device, d, local_script_path): d for d in devices}
        for future in as_completed(future_to_device):
            device_id = future_to_device[future]
            try:
                result = future.result()
                print(result)
            except Exception as exc:
                print(f"[{device_id}] Generated an exception: {exc}")

    os.unlink(local_script_path)
    print("Installation commands sent to all devices. Install may take a minute or two.")
minerType.runScript:
import os, time, json, subprocess, tempfile
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed

ADB = os.environ.get("adb_path", "adb")
devices = os.environ.get("devices", "").split()
wallet_address = os.environ.get("wallet_address", "")
pool_url = os.environ.get("pool_url", "")
threads = os.environ.get("threads", "8")
password = os.environ.get("password", "")
mode = os.environ.get("mode", "full")
worker_names_raw = os.environ.get("worker_names_json", "")
worker_names = json.loads(worker_names_raw) if worker_names_raw else {}
additional_flags = os.environ.get("additional_flags", "")

def parse_additional_flags(flags_str):
    """Parse comma-separated key=value flags into a dict with type conversion."""
    result = {}
    if not flags_str.strip():
        return result
    for flag in flags_str.split(","):
        flag = flag.strip()
        if "=" not in flag:
            continue
        key, value = flag.split("=", 1)
        key = key.strip()
        value = value.strip()
        if not key:
            continue
        # Type conversion
        if value.lower() == "true":
            result[key] = True
        elif value.lower() == "false":
            result[key] = False
        else:
            try:
                result[key] = int(value)
            except ValueError:
                try:
                    result[key] = float(value)
                except ValueError:
                    result[key] = value
    return result

def run_mining_on_device(device_id):
    """Start CellMiner mining on a single device"""
    try:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Starting CellMiner mining...")

        worker_name = worker_names.get(device_id, password)

        # Base config
        config = {
            "pool": pool_url,
            "wallet": wallet_address,
            "pass": worker_name if worker_name else "x",
            "worker": worker_name if worker_name else "cellminer-01",
            "threads": int(threads),
            "huge_pages": True,
            "mode": mode
        }

        # Merge additional flags (these override base config)
        extra = parse_additional_flags(additional_flags)
        if extra:
            print(f"[{device_id}] Additional flags: {extra}")
            config.update(extra)

        config_json = json.dumps(config)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Config: pool={pool_url} threads={config['threads']} mode={config['mode']}")

        print(f"[{device_id}] Force stopping Termux...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am force-stop com.termux", shell=True)
        time.sleep(2)

        # Push config to /sdcard/ (adb CAN write here)
        print(f"[{device_id}] Writing config.json to /sdcard/...")
        with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode='w', encoding='utf-8', newline='\n', delete=False, suffix='.json') as f:
            f.write(config_json)
            local_config_path = f.name
        subprocess.run(f'{ADB} -s {device_id} push "{local_config_path}" /sdcard/.cellhasher_config.json', shell=True, check=True)
        os.unlink(local_config_path)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Launching Termux...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am start -n com.termux/com.termux.app.TermuxActivity", shell=True)
        time.sleep(10)

        # Copy config from /sdcard/ into cellminer dir
        print(f"[{device_id}] Copying config into cellminer directory...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"cp%s/sdcard/.cellhasher_config.json%s~/cellminer/config.json\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(2)

        # cd into cellminer directory
        print(f"[{device_id}] Navigating to cellminer directory...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"cd%s~/cellminer\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(2)

        # Run the miner
        print(f"[{device_id}] Running miner...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"./cellminer%s--config%sconfig.json\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Keeping device screen on...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell svc power stayon true", shell=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] CellMiner mining initiated successfully!")
        return f"[{device_id}] Mining started"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Error starting mining: {e}")
        return f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}"

print("=== Starting CellMiner Mining (Parallel) ===")

if not devices:
    print("No devices specified in $devices environment variable")
elif not wallet_address:
    print("No wallet address specified in $wallet_address environment variable")
elif not pool_url:
    print("No pool URL specified in $pool_url environment variable")
else:
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=len(devices)) as executor:
        future_to_device = {executor.submit(run_mining_on_device, device_id): device_id for device_id in devices}

        for future in as_completed(future_to_device):
            device_id = future_to_device[future]
            try:
                result = future.result()
                print(result)
            except Exception as exc:
                print(f"[{device_id}] Generated an exception: {exc}")

    print("CellMiner mining started on all devices. Check the devices to see the progress.")
minerType.stopScript:
import os, time, subprocess
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed

ADB = os.environ.get("adb_path", "adb")
devices = os.environ.get("devices", "").split()

def stop_mining_on_device(device_id):
    """Stop CellMiner mining on a single device"""
    try:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Stopping CellMiner mining...")

        print(f"[{device_id}] Attempting to stop miner process using Termux...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am start -n com.termux/com.termux.app.TermuxActivity", shell=True)
        time.sleep(2)

        # Kill cellminer processes
        pkill_cmd = "pkill%s-f%scellminer"
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"{pkill_cmd}\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Attempting to force-kill miner process directly...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell pkill -f cellminer", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Force stopping Termux application as a last resort...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am force-stop com.termux", shell=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Turning device screen off...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell svc power stayon false", shell=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] CellMiner mining stopped successfully!")
        return f"[{device_id}] Mining stopped"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Error stopping mining: {e}")
        return f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}"

print("=== Stopping CellMiner Mining (Parallel) ===")

if not devices:
    print("No devices specified in $devices environment variable")
else:
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=len(devices)) as executor:
        future_to_device = {executor.submit(stop_mining_on_device, device_id): device_id for device_id in devices}

        for future in as_completed(future_to_device):
            device_id = future_to_device[future]
            try:
                result = future.result()
                print(result)
            except Exception as exc:
                print(f"[{device_id}] Generated an exception: {exc}")

    print("CellMiner mining stopped on all devices.")
minerType.uninstallScript:
import os, time, subprocess
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed

ADB = os.environ.get("adb_path", "adb")
devices = os.environ.get("devices", "").split()

def uninstall_miner_on_device(device_id):
    """Uninstall CellMiner from a single device"""
    try:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Starting CellMiner uninstallation...")

        print(f"[{device_id}] Force stopping Termux...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am force-stop com.termux", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Launching Termux...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am start -n com.termux/com.termux.app.TermuxActivity", shell=True)
        time.sleep(3)

        # Remove the mining directory - use %s to escape spaces for ADB input
        remove_command = "rm%s-rf%scellminer"
        print(f"[{device_id}] Removing mining directory...")
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text '{remove_command}'", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(2)

        print(f"[{device_id}] CellMiner uninstalled successfully!")
        return f"[{device_id}] Miner uninstalled"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Error uninstalling miner: {e}")
        return f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}"

print("=== Uninstalling CellMiner (Parallel) ===")

if not devices:
    print("No devices specified in $devices environment variable")
else:
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=len(devices)) as executor:
        future_to_device = {executor.submit(uninstall_miner_on_device, device_id): device_id for device_id in devices}

        for future in as_completed(future_to_device):
            device_id = future_to_device[future]
            try:
                result = future.result()
                print(result)
            except Exception as exc:
                print(f"[{device_id}] Generated an exception: {exc}")

    print("CellMiner uninstallation completed on all devices.")
